summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Eight open PRs are independent standalone candidates; #82495 is routed to central security handling because the PR describes possible disclosure of other users' state paths; #82386 needs maintainer judgment because it changes maintainer roster/source-of-truth documentation.
